rationale: Section 24 was repealed Nov. 5, 2019, so it has no operative force. No conflict exists with a repealed provision; homestead exemption authority now derives from art. VIII, §1-b(c).
_note: Rule text is a repealed provision with no operative language; no conflict possible. Relevant constitutional authority for the proposed change is Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b(c), not §24.
